Idea Name: AI-Powered Financial Fraud Detection and Risk Assessment System
Expected benefits:
Early fraud detection.
Reduced financial losses.
Improved financial system security.
Idea Description: The project aims to build an AI-based fraud detection system that analyzes transaction patterns, user behavior, and historical fraud cases to detect suspicious activities in real time. The system supports government financial institutions in preventing financial losses and improving trust.
potentail Challenges:
Highly imbalanced datasets.
Evolving fraud patterns.
Low tolerance for false positives.
